arts.ttl: AC Milan XI vs Udinese – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: AC Milan aim to keep alive their rapidly fading hopes of European football at Udinese this evening. Sergio Conceicao’s side recovered from two goals down to draw with Fiorentina last time out, but their habit of falling behind has been troublesome.
